creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

They are off by default maybe because of aditional deps for building them.

---
sysutils/polkit % make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for polkit-0.120_2:
     MANPAGES=off: Build and/or install manual pages
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
---

Assigning PR properly since author is committer.

Cheers
